items.title: EV Charging Station Management System
items.description: A complete full-stack platform supporting EV drivers (station search, booking, charging & payment), charge station staff (session & payment management), and administrators (system-wide analytics & reporting). Built with microservices architecture across 6 backend services, Kong API Gateway, RabbitMQ message broker, Apache NiFi ETL pipeline, Docker & Kubernetes.
items.techStack: Express.js + TypeScript microservices, NestJS + Prisma, React Native mobile app, React 18 + Vite web portal, PostgreSQL & MySQL databases.

items.title: StudyHub Platform
items.description: A social learning platform for students to share study materials, create study groups, engage in real-time chat, and rate resources.

items.title: Accounts Receivable Management
items.description: A full-stack customer debt management system for tracking receivables, payment history, and customer records. Built with Clean Architecture to digitize the Accounts Receivable process.

items.title: EVOLTTOUCH — Smart Kiosk
items.description: A touch-screen kiosk interface for EV charging stations, enabling drivers to browse stations, start/stop charging sessions, make payments, and scan QR codes. Features real-time OCPP communication via WebSocket with live charging status updates.

items.title: N-Queens Hill Climbing Visualizer
items.description: An interactive visualization of the N-Queens problem solved using the Hill Climbing algorithm. Users can adjust board size, observe real-time state exploration, and step through the algorithm's progress.

items.title: Capstone Social Network
items.description: A social network connecting users to share posts, images, and interact. Features user profiles, news feed, friend/follow system, and group participation.

items.title: Web Video Translator
items.description: A full-stack web application that detects videos from any website and translates them into Vietnamese with subtitles and voice-over.

items.title: SMTP Linux Mail Server
items.description: A custom SMTP server implementation on Linux to demonstrate low-level process management, I/O handling, and mail transfer protocol execution using Python.

items.title: Driver Drowsiness Alert
items.description: A computer vision application that monitors drivers in real-time, detecting signs of drowsiness or distraction to prevent accidents.

items.title: Victor IT Portfolio
items.description: A modern, responsive personal portfolio for IT professionals, built with React, Vite, TailwindCSS, and Framer Motion. Showcases high-quality frontend design principles.
